description_long: This is a large, modern wall-mounted shelving and cabinet unit made primarily of light wood with several white accent sections. The front features a combination of open cubical shelves, horizontal slots, and closed drawers, providing a variety of storage and display options. The left side of the unit has a cluster of small, square, white-framed shelves, while the right side includes longer horizontal shelves and compartments. The lower section contains two wide drawers with sleek white handles and a larger open cubby. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving the piece a natural and contemporary appearance. The overall design is geometric and modular, suitable for living rooms, offices, or public urban interiors.
description: A large, modern wall-mounted shelving and cabinet unit with light wood and white accents, featuring open shelves, drawers, and cubbies in a geometric layout.
description_view_0: The back of the unit, showing a flat wooden panel with no visible shelves or compartments.
description_view_1: A side profile revealing the unit's slim depth and layered construction, with some shelves and compartments visible in profile.
description_view_2: The front view displaying the full arrangement of open shelves, drawers, and cubbies, highlighting the geometric design and color contrast.
description_view_3: The opposite side profile, similar to view 1, showing the thickness and construction of the unit.
